CustomField.formula:
IF( Override_Dealer_Information__c = false, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__SalesRep__r.Street)), SBQQ__SalesRep__r.Street & " ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__SalesRep__r.City)), SBQQ__SalesRep__r.City & " ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__SalesRep__r.State)), SBQQ__SalesRep__r.State & " ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__SalesRep__r.PostalCode)), SBQQ__SalesRep__r.PostalCode & " ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__SalesRep__r.Country)), SBQQ__SalesRep__r.Country & " ", ""),
IF(NOT(ISBLANK($User.Street)), $User.Street & " ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK($User.City)), $User.City & " ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK($User.State)), $User.State & " ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK($User.PostalCode)), $User.PostalCode & " ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK($User.Country)), SBQQ__SalesRep__r.Country & " ", ""))
CustomField.label: Sender Address
